calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-09-2003 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-20-2003 Continued To Jul-21-03 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

Minor'S Compromise In Scd 218 At 09:00 A.M. On May 22, 2003
Off Calendar May-27-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/P. Dias, CSR. JoAnn Bryce.
Matthew Losinski, Esq. for Petitioner David Cheung the Guardian ad litem also present, for the minors claimants, Joanne Cheung and Kelly Cheung.
On the basis of evidence received, the Court grants the compromise as follows:
Attorney's fees: $125.00
A net balance of $375.00 to the Guardian ad litem.
Order signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-08-2003 Set For Order To Show Cause On Jun-02-03 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-04-2003 Sanctions
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $200.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is ordered off calendar. Proceedings reported by LaVon Granger. (212)
